name: otomoto
description: Find your dream car in Otomoto

interface.shortDescription: Find your dream car in Otomoto
interface.longDescription:
Find your dream car in Poland using everyday language. Skip the complex filters and search forms. With Otomoto, simply describe what you're looking for - "SUV with low milage great for family of 4 " or "recent model, city car"

Key features:
Smart search - Describe your ideal car in natural languageInstant results - Interactive refinement - Ask follow-up questions to narrow your search -Search insights - Get detailed information about any listing and compare

Whether you're a first-time buyer or seasoned motorhead, Otomoto makes car buying as simple as having a conversation.
defaultPrompt: Show me an automatic car below 150K PLN
